---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #123...<br>[Text<br>Animation]{.risque .biggeR}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/daffy2.png
#  data-background-opacity: ".4"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://wallpapers.com/images/hd/looney-tunes-characters-spotlight-2160733rt9058jno.jpg   #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {layout="[[10,10],]"}
::: first-column
+ Recap session #122
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Text Animation]{.risque .biggeR}](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-animate)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: second-column

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 185px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/3_24_26">
  <img src="/img/title122.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#122: 

![](https://pngimg.com/d/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="50" top="200"}

![](https://clipart-library.com/2023/2742709.png){.absolute width="160" top="250" right="85"}

## [[NCAA]{.ncaa} [tournament]{.ncaa2} {{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" >}}[brackets]{.ncaa2}{{< iconify mdi:bracket style="color:#ffffff;" flip="horizontal" >}}{{< iconify emojione:basketball >}}](https://nypost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2023/03/printable-blank-ncaa-bracket-2023.jpg?resize=1200,927&quality=75&strip=all)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Blank {{< iconify hugeicons:bullet style="color:#FFA500;" >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

+ `plotTourn` function extracted from [`MMBracketR` package](https://github.com/alexkaechele/MMBracketR/blob/master/R/plotTourn.R) 

```{r}

## Rename "Regions"
## Specify # of teams

plotTourn(32)   #<1>

```
1. whatever number you'd like -- [NCAA]{.ncaa} has 64 teams (32 plotted here for simplicity of presentation)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::

:::

![](../../../img/ncaabracketblank.JPG){.absolute right="0" bottom="60" height="400"}

### Populated {{< iconify streamline-freehand-color:worldwide-web-users >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

+ [`mRchmadness` package](https://github.com/elishayer/mRchmadness) has many fun functions -- `vignettes(mRchmadness)` walks through a few

```{r}

library(mRchmadness)
vignettes(mRchmadness) #<1>

draw.bracket(bracket.empty=bracket.men.2026)  #<2>

```
1. good explanation of package purpose and capabilities
2. has both mens and womens' pre--populated brackets going back to the 2017 tournament

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

:::

:::

![](../../../img/bracketncaafilled.JPG){.absolute bottom="80" right="-150" height="350"}

### Run--yer--own {{< iconify vscode-icons:folder-type-tools >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}

+ [`bracketeer`](https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/bracketeer/versions/0.1.1) intended for general tournament design & management
+ updating capability (you input game results as the tourney progresses)

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

:::

:::

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbGZzY3FtM3N2NjQ4OWtvOHBidnN2cG4zMmF0cGczM2FrNzdtNWcybSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/xUNd9ME5OUPAmhyLew/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-20" bottom="80"}

:::

# Today...

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeTBvYm04b2Y1cHUybGNsd3V4Y3JndHJ6MzdocXRnM3FjcTVwbXNueCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/hvpjW5tiu6cDK/giphy.gif)

## {{< animate hinge "Text Animation" delay=3s duration=10s >}}

Lots goin' on here... {{< iconify fluent-emoji-flat:confused-face >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

### Unadorned

```{r}

## shortcode:

{{< animate flash "Lookie Here!!" >}}

```

{{< animate flash "Lookie Here!!" >}}


:::

::: {.column width="34%"}

### Hyperlinked

```{r}

::: {.animate__animated .animate__bounce}

[Lookie Here!!](https://m.canouil.fr/quarto-animate/)

:::
  
```

::: {.animate__animated .animate__bounce}

[Lookie Here!!](https://m.canouil.fr/quarto-animate/)

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

### &nbsp;Fonts

```{r}

::: {.animate__animated .animate__flip}

[Lookie Here!!]{.risque .biggeR}

:::
  
```


::: {.animate__animated .animate__flip}

[Lookie Here!!]{.risque .biggeR}

:::

:::

:::

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNXlubTY3NjBhZWxvbWFqNzI4aG85Z3AwY244ZGszbml4bmV0MXN3MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0TK5JyuTqSfTxVTOwf/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-150" top="0" height="250"}

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNTljemF4dDhiaGtsejlrMzd3Mnh0NzZyaHdxMjlxdnJ3N3RjZmwxeCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/HwGAKG8Z00F1wloAfQ/giphy.gif){.absolute left="-120" bottom="0" height="270"}

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbTBiYWI0ZDVpaHNudWE0ZWhnenMzNndnazNhN3A5Ymhjc2hydjU1YyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/InDHoW8hBWXIihMVtZ/giphy.gif){.absolute right="250" top="-40" height="200"}

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbjZ1M2gwMm5hdnlmdGdwdWV4YWpwNHd0b3Z6c29xeTY0bGJ1eGliMCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/4JXQxpySdGXGNJrHU9/giphy.gif){.absolute height="170" right="420" bottom="20"}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: {{< iconify noto:paintbrush >}}{{< iconify noto:paintbrush >}}{{< iconify noto:paintbrush >}}
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
sessionInfo()
```
